title: Add 404 page and review Dependabot alerts
description: Pre-deploy polish: add src/pages/404.astro using Base layout matching existing design, and review the 3 moderate Dependabot vulnerabilities flagged on push to dev.

title: Add /next slash-command skill and p0-p3 priority labels
description: Project-scoped skill at .claude/skills/next/SKILL.md that picks the next unblocked GitHub issue (resuming any in-progress work first), plans it with testing-pyramid coverage, and executes on dev. Also: create p0-p3 GitHub labels, status:in-progress, epic, blocked; update /issue command to apply priority labels at creation; un-ignore .claude/ from git (keep settings.local.json ignored).
close_reason: Skill, /issue update, labels, and gitignore fix shipped in d88b4dc

title: Set up oxlint + ESLint + Prettier with Astro/Svelte plugins
description: Wire up tooling per the verdict: oxlint as fast gate for .ts/.js files only, ESLint + Prettier (with prettier-plugin-astro and prettier-plugin-svelte) as source of truth. Currently project has no lint/format tooling configured.
close_reason: Implemented oxlint + ESLint + Prettier with Astro/Svelte parser overrides. Scripts: lint, lint:fast, format, format:check. ESLint clean, oxlint surfaced 4 real warnings in existing code.

title: Remove unused satori-html dependency
description: Fallow flagged satori-html as unused. Verified via fallow trace and grep — zero imports across src/. og.ts uses satori directly without the html helper. Safe to remove from package.json.

title: Replace Tailwind v4 arbitrary-value tokens with generated utilities
description: Codebase has 270 instances of `prop-(--color-X)` / `max-w-(--container-X)` arbitrary-value forms in class attributes. All map 1:1 to auto-generated Tailwind v4 utilities (`text-fg`, `bg-bg-soft`, `max-w-page`, etc). Output CSS is identical — this is consistency + readability cleanup.
